title: pilea microphylla
intro: Pilea microphylla, also known as Aluminium plant or False Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, Pilea microphylla has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Pilea microphylla is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, although its effectiveness and safety are still being researched.
